summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sales Partner Management page including backend APIs and frontend UI. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI working correctly with modal, tabs, and save functionality all verified.

minor.issue: Returns 404 when no fields changed (same values saved), could return 200 with 'no changes' message instead

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
API URL correctly uses environment variable
Error handling present for both frontend and backend
Minor: useEffect dependency array missing token - could cause stale data issues if token changes
seed_data_creation: Test sales partner already existed with commission_settings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales Partner Management page fully functional. Backend API tests cover: auth, GET users, GET categories, PUT commissions (success, persistence, validation, auth). Frontend tested: page load, edit modal, fixed commissions tab, per-product tab, save functionality with persistence verification.

1_sales_partners_page_loads.details: Page loads at /admin/sales-partners with correct header, stats cards, and partner list

2_edit_commissions_modal.details: Modal opens when clicking 'Edit Commissions' button, shows partner info and commission form

3_fixed_commissions_tab.details: Shows Monthly Retainer, Onboarding Commission, Revenue % inputs with correct values

4_per_product_tab.details: Shows dynamic product categories (Suits & Jackets, Shirts, Denim Wear, Shoes) with individual product commission inputs

5_save_commission_settings.details: Clicking 'Save Commissions' saves data, shows success toast, modal closes, page updates with new values

6_commission_persistence.details: Updated values (monthly_retainer: 6000, commission_percentage: 10) verified in database via API

7_products_configured_count.details: Shows correct count (4) for products with commission > 0

8_per_product_badges.details: Displays badges for products with configured commissions (Suits: ₹500, Jackets: ₹300, Pants: ₹150, Formal Shirts: ₹200)
